steps.title: Identify what the travels produced
steps.content: The passage says Mr. Brooke “had travelled in his younger years, and was held in this part of the country to have contracted a too rambling habit of mind.” His travels resulted in a mental state described as “rambling” — unfocused and unpredictable.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Developed is correct because it expresses the target meaning: acquiring or developing a habit. The other three don't express this sense of acquiring. This matches the correct answer — C is correct.
